caribbean.headline: Caribbean Conditions: St. Maarten
caribbean.paragraph: St. Maarten in the Eastern Caribbean is the highest-impact location in the Caribbean this period, with winds peaking at 25 kt and seas building to 4.8 ft with E swell at 8s periods. 50% rain probability -- isolated showers possible but conditions remain manageable.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Conditions: Mykonos
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos in the Eastern Mediterranean is the highest-impact location in the Mediterranean this period, with winds peaking at 25 kt and seas building to 6.4 ft with NNE swell at 7s periods. 38% rain probability -- isolated showers possible but conditions remain manageable.
